content.problemStatement:
For an array BBB, we define f(B)f(B)f(B) as the second largest element of the array. For example, f([2,4,5,1])=4f([2, 4, 5, 1]) = 4f([2,4,5,1])=4.

You are given a permutation array AAA of NNN integers (Each element from [1,N][1, N][1,N] occurs exactly once).

Compute the sum of fff of all subarrays of AAA of size at least 222. Formally, compute the following sum: ∑L=1N∑R=L+1Nf([AL,AL+1,…,AR]\sum_{L = 1}^{N} \sum_{R = L + 1}^{N} f([A_L, A_{L + 1}, \ldots, A_R]∑L=1N​∑R=L+1N​f([AL​,AL+1​,…,AR​].


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line contains NNN - the size of the array.
The second line contains A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ - the elements.




Output Format
For each test case, output the sum ∑L=1N∑R=L+1Nf([AL,AL+1,…,AR]\sum_{L = 1}^{N} \sum_{R = L + 1}^{N} f([A_L, A_{L + 1}, \ldots, A_R]∑L=1N​∑R=L+1N​f([AL​,AL+1​,…,AR​].
constraints: Ai≠AjA_i \ne A_jAi​=Aj​ for all i≠ji \ne ji=j
The sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2⋅1052 \cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : There are 333 subarrays, [1,3][1, 3][1,3], [3,2][3, 2][3,2] and [1,3,2][1, 3, 2][1,3,2]. The second-maxes are 1,21, 21,2 and 222, with a sum of 555.
